/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.0.0 -o libgalay-http.1.0.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libgalay-http.1.dylib "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/kernel/http/HttpRouter.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpBase.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpBody.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpChunk.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpError.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpHeader.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpRequest.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http/HttpResponse.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/utils/Http1_1RequestBuilder.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/utils/Http1_1ResponseBuilder.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/utils/HttpLogger.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/utils/HttpUtils.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/kernel/websocket/WsHeartbeat.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/kernel/websocket/WsUpgrade.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/websocket/WebSocketFrame.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http2/Http2Base.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http2/Http2Frame.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-http.dir/protoc/http2/Http2Hpack.cc.o"  /usr/local/lib/libgalay-kernel.a -lpthread
